---
title: "Working Paper"
subtitle: "Sigmoid Analytica CRM & Commercial Strategy — an evidence-building enquiry"
toc: false
---

::: {.chapter-chips}
<span class="chip chip-grade-c no-dot">v0.1 · Hypothesis stage</span>
<span class="chip chip-neutral no-dot">No final conclusions drawn</span>
:::

::: {.section-lead}
This is a working paper, not a report. It states open questions and the evidence needed to answer
them — and deliberately reaches **no final conclusions** at v0.1. The source proposal is treated as
**Hypothesis v0.1** throughout.
:::

Each chapter follows the same discipline, so the reasoning stays honest and scannable:

::: {.lifecycle}
<li><span class="stage">Question</span></li>
<li><span class="arrow">→</span><span class="stage">Hypothesis</span></li>
<li><span class="arrow">→</span><span class="stage">Current evidence</span></li>
<li><span class="arrow">→</span><span class="stage">Evidence needed</span></li>
<li><span class="arrow">→</span><span class="stage">Analysis plan</span></li>
<li><span class="arrow">→</span><span class="stage">Limitations</span></li>
<li><span class="arrow">→</span><span class="stage">Next steps</span></li>
:::

## The three decision questions

::: {.cil-cards}
::: {.cil-card}
<div class="card-kicker">Decision 1 · Ch. 5</div>
<div class="card-title">Which segment should Sigmoid target first?</div>
<p>Market prioritisation across seven candidate segments.</p>
<span class="card-go">Read chapter 5</span>
[](05-market-prioritisation.qmd){.stretched-link aria-label="Open chapter 5"}
:::
::: {.cil-card}
<div class="card-kicker">Decision 2 · Ch. 4</div>
<div class="card-title">How should the CRM be positioned?</div>
<p>CRM vs Revenue Operations vs AI Readiness Platform.</p>
<span class="card-go">Read chapter 4</span>
[](04-crm-positioning.qmd){.stretched-link aria-label="Open chapter 4"}
:::
::: {.cil-card}
<div class="card-kicker">Decision 3 · Ch. 7</div>
<div class="card-title">What evidence is required before GTM?</div>
<p>The confidence threshold that gates a go-to-market commitment.</p>
<span class="card-go">Read chapter 7</span>
[](07-go-to-market.qmd){.stretched-link aria-label="Open chapter 7"}
:::
:::

## All chapters {.mt-section}

| # | Chapter | Focus |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | [Introduction](01-introduction.qmd) | Aim, scope, and how to read this paper |
| 2 | [Problem Context](02-problem-context.qmd) | The commercial situation; the proposal as Hypothesis v0.1 |
| 3 | [Commercial Intelligence Specification](03-commercial-intelligence-specification.qmd) | The governing method, in brief |
| 4 | [CRM Positioning](04-crm-positioning.qmd) | Decision 2 — how to position the product |
| 5 | [Market Prioritisation](05-market-prioritisation.qmd) | Decision 1 — which segment first |
| 6 | [AI Readiness](06-ai-readiness.qmd) | Testing the "CRM as AI foundation" thesis |
| 7 | [Go-to-Market](07-go-to-market.qmd) | Decision 3 — evidence threshold before committing |
| 8 | [Validation & Tests](08-validation-and-tests.qmd) | How claims and calculations are checked |
| 9 | [Conclusion](09-conclusion.qmd) | Deliberately open — current state, not verdicts |

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple" icon=false}
**Status of evidence.** All quantitative content in this paper is computed from **synthetic sample
data** and carries confidence grade **C or D**. The paper's value at v0.1 is in *framing the questions
correctly* and *specifying what would answer them* — not in the numbers.
:::
